commands.name: help
commands.description: Display more information on a specific command.

commands.name: run-migrations
commands.description: runs database migration on specified database

options.name: --target-version
options.description:
Target db version.If not specified then database
will be migrated to the latest version.Example:
10.2.3.5

options.name: --connection-string
options.description: Connection strings to the target database

options.name: --database
options.description:
Allows to override target database from
connection-string

options.name: --param
options.description:
Parameter for script in format 'name:value'. For
example -p addDemoData:1

options.name: --connection-string
options.description: Connection strings to the target database

options.name: --database
options.description:
Allows to override target database from
connection-string
